summary: Iteration 46 - Admin Contest Management Testing COMPLETE. All features working: Admin login, Matches list with status badges, Contests sub-tab, Match selection, Add Contest form with template dropdown, Create contest, Delete contest with confirmation, Max 5 contests enforcement, Back to Matches navigation. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - This is a React hydration warning from the visual editor wrapper, not a functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: AdminContestsTab.jsx: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Max 5 contests per match enforced both in frontend (UI warning) and backend (400 error)
Contest cards show all relevant info: name, template type badge, template name, question count, entry fee, participants, lock time, delete button
Progress bar changes color to red when at max (5/5)
Delete confirmation dialog shows contest name in Hindi: 'contest delete karna hai?'
16 questions seeded with correct Hindi text verified
2 templates available: First Innings (4 Qs, 305 pts) and Full Match (12 Qs, 965 pts)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (16 questions, 2 templates, 70 matches)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified Admin Contest Management. Key verified features: 1) Admin login flow (Get Started -> Phone -> PIN -> Admin Dashboard). 2) Matches bottom nav -> Contests sub-tab shows match list with COMPLETED/UPCOMING status badges. 3) Click match -> Contest detail view with match info, contest count progress bar (X/5), Add Contest button, existing contests list. 4) Add Contest form: Template dropdown (2 templates), Contest Name, Entry Fee, Max Players, Create Contest button. 5) Create contest works - 'Contest created!' message, count updates. 6) Delete contest works - confirmation dialog, 'Contest deleted!' message, count updates. 7) Max 5 contests enforced - warning 'Maximum 5 contests reached' replaces Add button when at 5. 8) Back to Matches button works. 9) RCB vs SRH match has 4 test contests (Test Contest 1-4). 10) 16 questions with Hindi text seeded. 11) 2 templates: First Innings (in_match, 4 Qs) and Full Match (full_match, 12 Qs).
